sections.paragraph:
φυλακίζω (cp. φυλακή; Wsd 18:4; TestJos 2:3; Ar. [JTS 25, 1924, p. 74 ln. 23]; Achmes 84, 3; 87, 12) aor. pass inf. φυλακισθῆναι Wsd 18:4, ptc. pl. φυλακισθέντας (Ar.) take into custody, imprison Ac 22:19; 1 Cl 45:4. S. φυλακή 3.—DELG s.v. φύλαξ.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

TestJos TestJos = Testament of Joseph, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Ar. Ar. = Aristides, apologist, II a.d.—List 5

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

  1. ln. = line

aor. aor. = aorist

inf. inf. = infinitive

ptc. ptc. = participle

  1. pl. = plural

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1068
